brand.name: Aries AI

scrollytellingSequence.title: Your Entire Sales Team — Automated.
scrollytellingSequence.subtitle: WhatsApp + Instagram automation that captures leads, follows up, and closes deals — while you sleep.

scrollytellingSequence.title: Leads Are Flooding In
scrollytellingSequence.subtitle: WhatsApp messages, Instagram DMs, ad clicks — hundreds of potential customers reaching out every day.

scrollytellingSequence.title: AI Takes Over
scrollytellingSequence.subtitle: Every message is instantly classified, prioritized, and responded to with contextual intelligence.

scrollytellingSequence.title: Automated Workflows Activate
scrollytellingSequence.subtitle: Chat flows, CRM syncing, smart follow-ups, payment collection — all running on autopilot.

scrollytellingSequence.title: Revenue Engine: Online

scrollytellingSequence.title: Start Your 14-Day Free Trial

features.title: Smart Broadcasting
features.description: Send promotions, offers, carousels to unlimited contacts with 98% open rates.

features.title: AI Chatbots
features.description: Drag & drop flow builder. Build conversational journeys in minutes.

features.title: Click-to-WhatsApp Ads
features.description: Run Facebook & Instagram ads that land directly on WhatsApp. 5X lead generation.

features.title: CRM & Analytics
features.description: Real-time campaign tracking. Monitor read, reply & click rates. Retarget smartly.

features.title: In-Chat Payments
features.description: Collect payments within WhatsApp via UPI, cards, and payment gateways.

features.title: Multi-Agent Live Chat
features.description: Multiple team members on the same WhatsApp number with smart routing.
